use_cases: Primary action trigger for forms and calls-to-action
Destructive action buttons for delete or remove operations
Secondary/tertiary actions using ghost and outline variants
Icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbar areas
Navigation links styled as buttons using the link variant
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui-styled button component with 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with CVA for variant management and Radix UI Slot for composition. Features standard focus ring states, hover transitions, and disabled state handling. Uses Tailwind CSS utility classes with design token variables for easy theming.
